revision.text: __NOINDEX__<noinclude>This template is used as a tracking mechanism for the [[meta:Help:Magic word|magic word]] <tt><nowiki>__NOINDEX__</nowiki></tt> until a proper tracking mechanism is implemented.</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__[[category:Wikipedia noindex pages]]{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{tfd}}</noinclude><includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{tfd}}</noinclude><includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: track transclusions in main namespace pages (See [[Wikipedia:Page Curation/Suggested improvements#8. No Index until patrolled]])
revision.text:
<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:NOINDEX]]": Allowing template editors on some templates with full protection dating back to pre-[[WP:TPROT]] times which aren't too often or too sensitively used. ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefini...
revision.text:
<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:NOINDEX]]": Allowing template editors on some templates with full protection dating back to pre-[[WP:TPROT]] times which aren't too often or too sensitively used. ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefini...
revision.text:
<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23043689808|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Noindexed articles]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Noindexed articles]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>__NOINDEX__{{#ifeq:{{{visible|}}}|yes|{{{text|This page has been removed from search engines' indexes.}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Noindexed articles]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
